description: Classify incoming documents into predefined business and medical categories

loan_application.description: A loan application form with applicant personal details, requested loan amount, purpose, income, and employment information

invoice.description: A vendor or supplier billing document containing invoice number, itemized charges, tax breakdown, and payment due date

contract.description: A legal agreement between two or more parties with defined terms, obligations, duration, value, and signatures

purchase_order.description: A buyer-issued procurement document listing ordered items, quantities, unit prices, delivery date, and supplier details

kyc_document.description: A government-issued identity document such as PAN card, Aadhaar, passport, or driving license used for customer verification

medical_report.description: A diagnostic lab report or medical test result document containing patient name, age, lab number, specimen type, test parameters, reference ranges, and pathologist remarks

bank_statement.description: A financial account statement displaying account summary, beginning/ending balances, deposits, withdrawals, and an itemized history of transactions
